questions.question: Parker Solar Probe is associated with which space agency?
questions.explanation: Solar wind is a flow of energized particles originating from the sun’s corona, the outer region of its hot atmosphere, and traveling towards the Earth. The data collected by NASA’s Parker Solar Probe has discovered the source of the solar wind. The new study revealed that the solar winds originate from certain particular regions of the Sun.

questions.question: Which country organised the ‘Mission Mode Cataract Surgery’ campaign?
questions.explanation: ‘Mission Mode Cataract Surgery’ campaign was organized across India for screening, testing and awareness about cataract. In the ‘Mission Mode Cataract Surgery’ campaign, the Union Health Ministry surpassed the target of 75 lakh cataract surgeries in 2022-23, with approximately 83 lakh surgeries conducted this year.

questions.question: As per a recent research, which energy drink ingredient is capable of slowing down the ageing process?
questions.explanation: Taurine is an energy drink ingredient. A recent research found that it is capable of slowing down the ageing process and maintaining vitality in animals. Blood tests on mice, monkeys and people revealed levels of taurine, average 60-year-old have roughly a third of the levels of a five-year-old.

questions.question: The foundation stone for a ‘Fisheries Harbour’ has been laid in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: The foundation stone for the Cochin Fisheries Harbour was laid recently. The project is worth Rs. 169.17 crores. Union Minister of Ports, Shipping and Waterways Sarbananda Sonowal and Union Minister for Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying Parshottam Rupala laid the foundation stone of Modernisation and Upgradation Works of Cochin Fishing Harbour at Thoppumpady in Kerala.

questions.question: ‘SCORES’ is the grievance redressing platform of which institution?
questions.explanation: The SCORES platform allows the public to lodge a complaint with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and view its status. As many as 2,457 complaints against companies and market intermediaries have been disposed of via this platform.

questions.question: Which country is the host of this year’s edition of ‘Miss World pageant’?
questions.explanation: Miss World pageant is one of the oldest beauty pageants in the world. The Miss World Organization recently announced that India is the venue for this year’s edition of the event. Contestants from over 130 countries will showcase their talents, intelligence, and compassion. They will participate in a series of rigorous competitions, including talent showcases, sports challenges, and charitable initiatives etc.

questions.question: Which rocket is set to be used for the launch of ‘Chandrayaan-3’ mission?
questions.explanation: Chandrayaan-3 will be launched between July 12 and 19 in the year 2023. It is an ambitious space mission that aims to land on the surface of the Moon. The rocket, LVM-3, is going to be used for this launch and its assembly is being undertaken. The upcoming launch intends to demonstrate end-to-end competence in safe lunar landing and exploration.

questions.question: Which institution created an internal model to produce an Export Leading Index (ELI) specifically for India?
questions.explanation: Export Leading Index (ELI) predicts the growth of a country’s exports by considering various external and internal factors on a quarterly basis. The EXIM bank has created an internal model to produce an Export Leading Index (ELI) specifically for India, enabling the tracking and prediction of India’s export trends on a quarterly basis.

questions.question: Which Union Territory topped the ‘Food Safety Index 2022-23’?
questions.explanation: Jammu and Kashmir has maintained its first rank in the Union Territory (UT) category in Food Safety Index 2022-23. The Department of Food and Drugs Administration J&K has received the award third time in a row for 2021, 2022, and 2023. The index is released annually by the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI).

questions.question: Who is the most successful Indian left-arm spinner in Test cricket, as of 2023?
questions.explanation: Ravindra Jadeja breaks the record of India’s most successful left-arm spinner, Bishan Singh Bedi. On the third day of the India-Australia World Test Championship final, Jadeja took 267 wickets in 65 Test matches with an economy rate of 2.44 and an average of 24.25. Bedi held this record for the longest time with 266 wickets in 67 matches.
